use_cases: Animated hero section backgrounds for landing pages
Dynamic visual effects for product showcases
Interactive decorative backgrounds for web applications
Immersive visual layers for media and entertainment sites
ai_summary: A Three.js WebGL shader component that renders flowing wave animations using custom GLSL vertex and fragment shaders. The component creates dynamic, animated wave effects suitable for use as interactive backgrounds or hero section elements. Includes React state hooks to control shader uniforms for reminder states and dimming effects.
